---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new agent capability, security scanner, dashboard page, or API endpoint
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the use case or gap in current functionality.

## Proposed solution

How you think it should work. Include:
- Which agent(s) or module(s) would be affected
- Expected inputs and outputs
- Any new API endpoints or dashboard pages needed

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered.
